UI_Intro1: BELOW THE ASH, THE ARK SLEEPS TOUGH.
UI_Intro2: ABOVE, THE DEAD COLLECT WHAT'S OWED..
UI_Intro3: BETWEEN, THE FAITHFUL GUARD THE DOVE.
UI_optionscreen_BWOA_Backup: It is recommended that you make a frequent backup of your save file. One of the reasons is that you will have only one life and no ability to respawn. But also game crashes may lead to save file corruption, and you will have no way to recover your progress. Your save files are located in the Zomboid/Saves directory.
UI_quick_tip2: Check the Mission Panel every time it updates.
UI_quick_tip3: Talking to Emma may be required to progress the story.
UI_quick_tip4: Weather and radiation are no joke.
UI_quick_tip5: Flashing objects can be interacted with.
UI_quick_tip6: Conditions inside the Ark may affect your health.
UI_quick_tip7: Radiation spreads to items and clothing.
UI_quick_tip8: Reading lore items is crucial to your progress. Lore items are categorized separately from regular literature.
UI_quick_tip9: Eating action will remove your gas mask.
UI_quick_tip10: Gas masks require filters to function properly. Used filters can be replaced.
UI_quick_tip11: Use a Geiger counter to check radiation levels.
UI_quick_tip12: Radiation accumulates in your body and has delayed effects.
UI_quick_tip13: Potassium iodide increases your chances of resisting radiation effects.
UI_quick_tip14: Your dreams will change over time.
UI_quick_tip15: Zombies have evolved since you last encountered them.
UI_quick_tip16: Aspirin reduces pain and helps fight off the cold.
UI_quick_tip17: Pentoxifylline reduces fatigue and endurance loss caused by CO2 intoxication.
UI_quick_tip18: Working vehicles can only be found by completing missions.
UI_quick_tip19: Didn't catch what Emma said? You can ask her to repeat it.
UI_quick_tip20: Carry a spare mask in case of filter failure.
UI_quick_tip22: Press T to talk to people. Hold Q for other possible interactions.
UI_quick_tip23: You can never have enough insulated clothing.
UI_quick_tip24: Sleep regularly — you may gain inspiration afterward.
UI_quick_tip27: Items in your inventory can become radioactive.
UI_quick_tip28: Hungry? Forage a worm, grow a cucumber, or try… human meat.
UI_quick_tip29: Sound travels far in the wasteland.
UI_quick_tip30: The dead aren't the only thing to fear.
UI_quick_tip32: Your memories and skills recover in time or as you interact with the world.
UI_quick_tip35: Time is an useful resource. So is the sledgehammer.
UI_quick_tip36: It's not a crisis. It's a consequence.
UI_quick_tip40: You are not who you think you are.
UI_quick_tip43: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you; when you walk through fire, you shall not be burned.
UI_quick_tip44: I will send the pestilence among you.
UI_quick_tip45: I will cause the sun to go down at noon, and I will darken the earth in the clear day.
UI_quick_tip46: We are troubled on every side, yet not distressed; perplexed, but not in despair; persecuted, but not forsaken.
UI_quick_tip47: Whoever saves one life saves the world entire.
UI_quick_tip48: Whatsoever a man soweth, that shall he also reap.
UI_quick_tip49: The earth opened her mouth and swallowed them.
UI_quick_tip50: You shall have no other gods before Me.
UI_quick_tip51: My Spirit will not contend with humans forever, for they are mortal; their days will be a hundred and twenty years.
UI_quick_tip52: For whoever wants to save their life will lose it, but whoever loses their life for me will find it.
UI_quick_tip53: Nothing is a cliché when it's happening to you.
UI_quick_tip54: The Lord gives and the Lord takes away. Blessed be the name of the Lord.
UI_quick_tip58: Hold Q (default) to open the emote wheel.
UI_quick_tip_joke2: Noah Whitlock led the OASIS Project as a response to a forecasted inevitable global incident of unknown cause.
UI_quick_tip_joke3: OASIS Project led to a construction of Arks located across the country.
UI_quick_tip_joke4: It is unknown where the command to press the red button came from.
UI_quick_tip_joke5: Sweeper Squad group was formed as a result of dessertion from CDC leadership.
UI_quick_tip_joke6: "Endure" - to continue to exist for a long time.
UI_quick_tip_joke27: Commodore 64 (C64), released in 1982, was heavily used for science, education, and engineering applications.
